channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Ex-Starbucks CEO Schultz Moves With Family Office to Miami - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Ex-Starbucks CEO Schultz Moves With Family Office to Miami  Bloomberg.com
  2. Former Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz moves to Florida from Washington state  Fox Business
  3. Seattle billionaire announces move to Miami  The Seattle Times
  4. Howard Schultz to leave Seattle as business community bristles over income tax  KOMO
  5. Starbucks founder Howard Schultz moves to Florida after retirement  king5.com

item.title: A data center opened next door. Then came the high-pitched whine. - Politico
item.description:
1. A data center opened next door. Then came the high-pitched whine.  Politico
  2. FERC approves ComEd data center transmission agreements  Utility Dive
  3. Trump Announces A.I. Industry Pledge to Pay for Power  The New York Times
  4. Eric Schmidt: big tech should power its own AI ambitions  Fortune
  5. Lawmakers push for data center reform as energy bills are already seeing an impact  WMAR 2 News Baltimore

item.title: Woman allegedly touches passengers' faces then punches elderly travelers during Caribbean flight - Fox News
item.description:
1. Woman allegedly touches passengers' faces then punches elderly travelers during Caribbean flight  Fox News
  2. Woman jailed after Atlanta-bound flight diverted to MIA over midair scuffle, cops say  WPLG Local 10
  3. Midair passenger fight forces Atlanta-bound Frontier flight to divert to Miami; woman arrested  CBS News
  4. Frontier flight diverted to Miami International after passenger fight, MDSO says  Miami Herald
  5. Alabama woman prompts flight diversion to Miami after reportedly assaulting fellow passengers.  stl.news

item.title: More pain in private credit with JPMorgan reportedly tightening lending while a $33 billion fund sees heavy redemptions - MarketWatch
item.description:
1. More pain in private credit with JPMorgan reportedly tightening lending while a $33 billion fund sees heavy redemptions  MarketWatch
  2. JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans  CNBC
  3. JPMorgan marking down loan portfolios of private credit groups  Financial Times
  4. JPMorgan Restricts Private Credit Lending After Markdowns  Yahoo Finance
  5. Private Credit Gets Marked Down  Bloomberg.com
